post.summary: Creates or updates redactions and highlights for a document in a workspace.
post.description:
This endpoint accepts a collection of annotations. New annotations are created and existing annotations are updated
when their identifiers are provided.

requestBody.description: Request body containing one or more annotations to create or update.

get.summary: Retrieves annotations for a document and markup set in a workspace.
get.description: Returns the current annotation payload associated with the document image and markup set.

delete.summary: Deletes annotations for a document and markup set in a workspace.
delete.description: Removes one or more annotations specified in the request body from the target document and markup set.

requestBody.description: Request body containing annotation identifiers to remove.

post.summary: Submits a conversion request and returns a viewer content key for document viewer rendering.
post.description:
Supports document, production, image, and file-field conversion scenarios used by the Document Viewer REST API.
The returned value includes keys used to track conversion and retrieve converted content.

requestBody.description: Request payload containing workspace, document identifiers, conversion type, and conversion options.

get.summary: Retrieves persistent highlight sets and terms applied to a specific document.
get.description: Returns highlight set metadata and term definitions scoped to the specified document in the workspace.

post.summary: Changes the active state of a persistent highlight set or selected terms.
post.description: Use this endpoint to activate or deactivate an entire set, or to change state for specific term identifiers.

requestBody.description: Request body describing the state action and optional term identifiers.

get.summary: Retrieves all persistent highlight sets and terms available in a workspace.

post.summary: Adds one or more new terms to an existing persistent highlight set.
post.description: Each term can include foreground and background colors that define how it appears in the viewer.

requestBody.description: Request body containing terms to append to the highlight set.

post.summary: Retrieves attachment metadata for a short message document.
post.description: Returns attachment records for the attachment identifiers supplied in the request body.

parameters.name: workspaceID
parameters.description: The Artifact ID of the workspace containing the documents for short message viewer.

parameters.name: documentID
parameters.description: The Artifact ID of the short message document.

requestBody.description: The attachment IDs to return information about.

post.summary: Retrieves entity information for one or more short message participants.
post.description: Participant lookups use participant identity details from the request body and return mapped entity details.

parameters.name: workspaceID
parameters.description: The Artifact ID of the workspace containing the documents for short message viewer.

requestBody.description: The ParticipantRequest object of the workspace containing the name, email address and id of a participant for short message viewer.

get.summary: Retrieves the JSON representation of a short message conversation document.
get.description: The JSON structure aligns with RSMF manifest-style payloads used by the short message viewer.

parameters.name: workspaceID
parameters.description: The Artifact ID of the workspace containing the documents for short message viewer.

parameters.name: documentID
parameters.description: The Artifact ID of the document for short message viewer.

post.summary: Requests creation of a new short message document from a subset of events.
post.description: This operation queues slicing work and supports options such as attachment creation and participant preservation.

parameters.name: workspaceID
parameters.description: The Artifact ID of the workspace containing the document to be sliced.

parameters.name: documentID
parameters.description: The Artifact ID of the document to be sliced.

requestBody.description: A SliceRequest object containing details about the request.

get.summary: Validates whether the specified short message document contains a valid RSMF payload.
get.description: Returns validation status and diagnostic details for document-level RSMF validation.

parameters.name: workspaceID
parameters.description: The Artifact ID of the workspace containing the documents for short message viewer.

parameters.name: documentID
parameters.description: The Artifact ID of the short message document.

Bearer.description: Standard Authorization header using the Bearer scheme. Example: "bearer {token}"
